title: A4 Photo Frame, Light Grey, Pack of 2, Picture Frame, Certificate, Art Print Poster, 21cm x 29.7cm, Grey Frames, A4 Photo Collage Gallery Display
features: Elevate Your Space with Stylish and Versatile A4 Frames – These sleek grey frames are designed to beautifully showcase certificates, photos, and artwork in both portrait and landscape orientations. Perfect for any home or office décor, they bring a modern touch of elegance and sophistication to your space.

Contemporary Grey Frames – The smooth grey finish of these A4 frames provides a stylish and modern look, enhancing the beauty of your photos, certificates, or artwork. They’re perfect for creating a polished and professional display in any room.

Perfect Fit for A4 Prints – Designed to snugly fit standard A4 prints (21x29.7 cm), these frames feature an outer size of 23.9x32.6 cm with a sleek 20mm frame profile and 15mm depth, adding a contemporary touch to any photo or document display.

Ideal for Certificates – Whether displaying diplomas, awards, or important documents, these A4 grey frames are specifically designed to protect and highlight your achievements. With their sleek and professional finish, they’re perfect for both home and office environments.

Durable Construction – Crafted from high-quality materials, these frames provide durability while ensuring long-lasting performance. They’re built to protect your photos, certificates, or artwork, offering a reliable display solution for years to come.
description: Product Description Immortalise special moments MEMORIES IN EVERY FRAME Display your cherished memories with elegance in our versatile frames, designed for both wall mounting and table top presentation. Complete with wall hangers and a kick stand for stylish adaptability. Capture your precious moments in our sleek frames, tailored for any orientation. Its elegant design and clean lines add sophistication to all your treasured photos, whether in landscape or portrait format. Perfect for displaying and protecting your cherished memories.
